root_cause: Desktop home ownership depended on matchMedia(min-width:1024px). A post-first-paint viewport/breakpoint change triggered location.reload(), and the reloaded page started the old React home layout.
fixes: Desktop/mobile ownership is decided once from physical-device signals rather than CSS viewport width.
Removed the breakpoint change listener and location.reload() path.
Locked the desktop host visible and the React root hidden on the desktop home route.
Loaded the exact desktop helper synchronously after its host.
Moved exact desktop ownership CSS outside the volatile 1024px media query.
Added responsive compact-desktop rules for browser zoom and narrow desktop windows.
